arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Stuttgart
arts.sum: Real Madrid start their Champions League campaign with a visit from German side VfB Stuttgart on Tuesday evening. However, Ancelotti is starting to see some key figures return and here's how he could line his side up against Stuttgart midweek.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed Jude Bellingham injury boost ahead of Champions League opener
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham is set to be available for the opening game of the club's Champions League defence this week after a month out with a muscle problem. Bellingham has not featured since Madrid's first La Liga game of the season against Mallorca on 18 August, having suffered a muscle complaint in his right leg in training a few days later.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid vs Stuttgart PREVIEW
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Jose Perez discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Endrick, 18, marries woman months after signing 'relationship contract'
arts.sum: Brazil star Endrick and influencer Gabriely Miranda have tied the knot less than a year into their relationship, which already included a contract with a number of strange clauses

arts.ttl: The message Neymar reportedly sent Real Madrid stars on why Kylian Mbappe is ‘hell’ to play with
arts.sum: The French striker joined on a free transfer from PSG this past summer

arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed double injury boost for Stuttgart clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Monday been afforded some altogether timely positive news on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that two leading members of the club’s…

arts.ttl: Conor Gallagher joins Jude Bellingham in exclusive club after first Atlético goal
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid star Conor Gallagher has secured for himself a place in something of a special La Liga club. This comes owing to the midfielder’s exploits in Atlético’s latest outing.…

arts.ttl: Férland Mendy to renew with Real Madrid: contract and salary details
arts.sum: Last season, Mendy made a total of 37 appearances in all competitions, being the ninth outfield player with the most minutes (the fourth defender, with 1,147 minutes more than Fran García) and scored one goal - the team’s second in the 5-3 Super Cup semi-final win against Atlético in Saudi Arabia. Férland Mendy is set to renew his contract with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Neymar tells Real Madrid star Vinicius of “catastrophic war” and Kylian Mbappé “hell”
arts.sum: While Neymar’s friendship with Messi has been well known since their Barcelona days, the same can’t be said for new Real Madrid attacker Kylian Mbappé. On paper, an attacking trio of Neymar, Kylian Mbappé and Lionel Messi should’ve worked like a dream at Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Defender Dani Carvajal gives update on future
arts.sum: Real Madrid defender Dani Carvajal provides an update on his future amid speculation that Los Blancos may soon be in the market for a replacement.
